name: C2xSetMapObjectLineColor
title: C2xSetMapObjectLineColor
tables: long C2xSetMapObjectLineColor( long handle, float lineColor );
Sets the line color of a map object.
handle Reference of the map object

lineColor RGB color value (e.g. calculated by makeRGB, default: 0) Note makeRGB Up to and including CANoe version 12.0 SP2, the function makeRGB returned the blue value in the second byte and the red value in the fourth byte.Functions that received this value as a parameter interpreted this exchange so that the color was displayed correctly. From CANoe 12.0 SP3, the function makeRGB returns the color values in the correct order.Functions that have received this value as a parameter have also been adjusted to display the correct color again. Existing programs only need to be adapted if you have not used the function makeRGB but you have passed the color hard coded.

Note makeRGB Up to and including CANoe version 12.0 SP2, the function makeRGB returned the blue value in the second byte and the red value in the fourth byte.Functions that received this value as a parameter interpreted this exchange so that the color was displayed correctly. Existing programs only need to be adapted if you have not used the function makeRGB but you have passed the color hard coded.

Existing programs only need to be adapted if you have not used the function makeRGB but you have passed the color hard coded.
0 if success, else the set went wrong
Example See Map Window API example.
